---
title: "Quick Demo"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Quick Demo}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", cache = FALSE)
quiet <- function(expr) invisible(capture.output(suppressMessages(expr)))
```

## Connect

```{r connect, cache = FALSE}
library(dsFlowerClient)
library(DSI)
library(DSOpal)

builder <- DSI::newDSLoginBuilder()
builder$append(server = "hospital_a", url = "https://localhost:8443",
               user = "administrator", password = "admin123",
               driver = "OpalDriver",
               options = "list(ssl_verifyhost=0, ssl_verifypeer=0)")
builder$append(server = "hospital_b", url = "https://localhost:8444",
               user = "administrator", password = "admin123",
               driver = "OpalDriver",
               options = "list(ssl_verifyhost=0, ssl_verifypeer=0)")

conns <- DSI::datashield.login(logins = builder$build(), assign = FALSE)
```

## Load data

```{r load-data}
DSI::datashield.assign.table(conns, "D", "flower_demo.train_data")
```

## Initialize

```{r init}
ds.flower.nodes.init(conns, data = "D")

caps <- DSI::datashield.aggregate(
  conns, expr = quote(flowerGetCapabilitiesDS("flower"))
)
for (srv in names(caps)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %s: %d rows x %d cols\n",
    srv, caps[[srv]]$data_n_rows, caps[[srv]]$data_n_cols))
}
```

## Start SuperLink

```{r superlink}
ds.flower.nodes.prepare(
  conns, target_column = "target",
  feature_columns = c("f1", "f2", "f3", "f4", "f5")
)

quiet(ds.flower.superlink.start())
status <- ds.flower.superlink.status()
status[c("pid", "fleet_address", "federation_id")]
```

```{r proof}
system2("ps", c("-p", status$pid, "-o", "pid,command"), stdout = TRUE)
```

## Train

```{r train}
quiet(ds.flower.nodes.ensure(conns))
Sys.sleep(10)

result <- ds.flower.run.start(
  ds.flower.recipe(
    task     = ds.flower.task.classification(),
    model    = ds.flower.model.sklearn_logreg(C = 1.0),
    strategy = ds.flower.strategy.fedavg(
      min_fit_clients = 2L, min_available_clients = 2L),
    num_rounds      = 5L,
    target_column   = "target",
    feature_columns = c("f1", "f2", "f3", "f4", "f5")
  ),
  verbose = FALSE
)
```

## Results

```{r results}
result
```

## Predict with the trained model

```{r predict}
new_patients <- data.frame(
  f1 = c(1.5, -0.5, 0.3),
  f2 = c(2.0,  0.1, 1.2),
  f3 = c(1.0, -1.0, 0.5),
  f4 = c(0.2,  0.5, 0.8),
  f5 = c(0.1,  0.3, -0.2)
)

features <- c("f1", "f2", "f3", "f4", "f5")
new_patients$prob  <- round(ds.flower.predict(result, new_patients[features], type = "prob"), 4)
new_patients$class <- ds.flower.predict(result, new_patients[features])
new_patients
```

## Save model

The trained model can be saved to disk for later use:

```{r save, eval = FALSE}
ds.flower.save_model(result, "my_model.rds")

# Load and predict later
model <- readRDS("my_model.rds")
ds.flower.predict(model, new_data)
```

## Cleanup

```{r cleanup, cache = FALSE, include = FALSE}
ds.flower.nodes.cleanup(conns)
ds.flower.superlink.stop()
DSI::datashield.logout(conns)
```
